idle: Welcome Mayor, the city is stable.
warning: Mayor, we have critical infrastructure issues! Check water and power.
generic_resource: Mayor, this {biome} contains {amount} t. of {resource}. It's an excellent location!
wood: Mayor, this dense forest contains around {amount} tons of timber. A Lumberjack Hut would be perfect here!
stone: We spotted {amount} tons of high-quality stone. Ideal for a Quarry.
iron: Excellent news! A vein of {amount} tons of Iron is located here. We need a Mine.
gold: Jackpot! {amount} ounces of Gold under this land. Place a Gold Mine immediately!
silver: A rare find. We have {amount} ounces of Silver here. This will fill our treasury.
coal: This area is rich in fossil fuels. {amount} tons of Coal. Perfect for our energy needs.
oil: Black gold! {amount} barrels of Crude Oil are bubbling under the surface. Build a Pump Jack!
animals: Magnificent deer live here. A Hunter's Hut will bring us food.
fish: The waters are teaming with life! A Fisherman's Hut here is a guaranteed catch.
